# Fixture Project

A hermetic fixture used only by the Playwright smoke suite in `web/test/`. It exercises the
vault-reading contract in `skills/design-studio-shared/CONVENTIONS.md` — never a real client
project.

## Overview

This project stands in for a Full-route engagement that ran through debrief, research, verify,
scope, directions, converge, design-system, and build — skipping reframe — and is now in
validate.

## Recommended next step

Run `design-studio-validate` with the two in-session signals and record any decision-invalidating
findings as superseding entries.

## Overrides

- 2026-01-14 — skipped reframe (the restated problem was already the true problem)
- 2026-01-22 — built without an updated design-system lint (npx unavailable)
